signals.label: Curiosity gap
signals.description: How strongly the opening creates an unanswered question.

signals.label: Specificity
signals.description: How concrete and situational the wording feels.

signals.label: Narrative tension
signals.description: How visible the conflict or stakes are.

signals.label: Payoff promise
signals.description: How clear the reader benefit feels if they keep reading.

signals.label: Credibility
signals.description: How believable and grounded the opening sounds.
